design_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Premium dark tech with soft calming glows to support neurodiversity
Emotion First: Deep space calm and focused learning environment
Negative Space: Generous padding, p-6 to p-12 minimum for cognitive clarity
Contrast: Soft luminous accents against deep dark backgrounds for readability

surface_strategies.name: Crystal Glassmorphism
surface_strategies.usage: Headers, Floating Navs, Modal Overlays, Cards
surface_strategies.classes: bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)] rounded-2xl

surface_strategies.name: The Tracing Beam
surface_strategies.usage: Premium Action Cards, Active Game states
surface_strategies.classes: relative overflow-hidden before:absolute before:inset-0 before:bg-gradient-to-r before:from-emerald-500/20 before:to-amber-500/20 before:opacity-0 hover:before:opacity-100 before:transition-opacity

layout_spacing.bento_grid: Wide gap-8 to gap-12 for marketing, gap-6 for dashboard

components_instructions.buttons: Replace pastel buttons with sleek dark glass buttons: bg-white/10 hover:bg-white/20 border border-white/10 text-white rounded-full transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(52,211,153,0.3)]
components_instructions.cards: Remove solid light backgrounds. Use Crystal Glassmorphism. Ensure internal padding is at least p-6. Add subtle hover lift (-translate-y-1).
components_instructions.chat_bubble: User: bg-emerald-500/20 border border-emerald-500/30 text-emerald-50. Assistant: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 text-slate-200. Both with backdrop-blur-md.
components_instructions.games: Memory cards should be dark glass panels that flip to reveal glowing emerald/amber symbols. Use 3D preserve-3d and backface-hidden.
components_instructions.global_css_overrides: In index.css and App.css, replace all FDFBF7/8ABF9B/F2C48D with dark variables. Remove box-shadows that are bright. Implement dark mode root variables.

animations.hover: Subtle translate-y-1, increased border opacity, soft glow box-shadow
animations.glow_pulse: Slow opacity pulse on glowing background gradients

hero_background.description: Abstract dark glassmorphic background with soft emerald and warm amber volumetric lighting
hero_background.usage: Landing Page Hero background image (using cover, opacity 40%)

dashboard_banner.description: Abstract 3D geometric shapes floating in deep space
dashboard_banner.usage: Dashboard top banner or background accent

game_pattern.description: 3D glassmorphic puzzle pieces floating in dark environment

ai_tutor_bg.description: Glowing brain synapses network in dark space
ai_tutor_bg.usage: AI Tutor side panel or background

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text on dark glass has sufficient contrast. Use Text Shadow if necessary.
accessibility.reduced_motion: Wrap glow and float animations in prefers-reduced-motion media queries.
accessibility.focus: All interactive elements must have focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-500 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-offset-background

testing.data_testid: Apply data-testid to all buttons, links, inputs, and game elements using kebab-case role-based names.

instructions_to_main_agent: Update index.css with the new dark mode CSS variables provided.
Replace Nunito and Figtree with Outfit and Manrope in Google Fonts import.
Update App.css to remove pastel colors. Use background: transparent and let Tailwind handle glassmorphism via bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-xl.
Rewrite component classes to use the Crystal Glassmorphism strategy: bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10.
Apply background gradients to the main App wrapper (e.g., bg-[radial-gradient(ellipse_at_top,_var(--tw-gradient-stops))] from-slate-900 via-[#05050A] to-black).
For the Games, implement dark themed glowing cards instead of pastel blocks.
Ensure all pages (Landing, Login, Dashboard, Analytics, AITutor) conform to this dark premium SaaS layout.
